steps.t: Sogadan the Vintner is in Rivendell, away in the Trollshaws. You should collect Dorwinion Red wine from Sogadan, but it shall be delivered as Dorwinio…
Lendasil is in the Ruins of Edhelion in Ered Luin, waiting to taste the Dorwinion White. You have only false wine to give Lendasil... red wine, actual…
